mapper.update: UPDATE web_info SET blog_title = #{blogTitle}, blog_author = #{blogAuthor}, blog_domain = #{blogDomain}, blog_description = #{blogDescription}, blog_icp = #{blogIcp}, user_account = #{userAccount}, user_password = NULL, user_avatar = #{userAvatar}, user_talk = #{userTalk}, social_github = #{socialGithub}, social_email = #{socialEmail}, social_bilibili = #{socialBilibili}, social_qq = #{socialQQ}, social_netease_cloud = #{socialNeteaseCloud}, openai_token = #{openAiToken}, netease_cookies = #{neteaseCookies}, github_token = #{githubToken} WHERE id = 1
